test.create_query: CREATE TABLE map_subcol_pw_wide (id UInt64, tags Map(String, String)) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY id SETTINGS min_bytes_for_wide_part = 0, min_rows_for_wide_part = 0
CREATE TABLE map_subcol_pw_compact (id UInt64, tags Map(String, String)) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY id SETTINGS min_bytes_for_wide_part = '10G', min_rows_for_wide_part = 1000000000
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO map_subcol_pw_wide SELECT number AS id, mapFromArrays( arrayMap(i -> 'k' || toString(i), range(16)), arrayMap(i -> toString(number + i), range(16))) AS tags FROM numbers_mt(5000000)
OPTIMIZE TABLE map_subcol_pw_wide FINAL SETTINGS mutations_sync=1
INSERT INTO map_subcol_pw_compact SELECT number AS id, mapFromArrays( arrayMap(i -> 'k' || toString(i), range(16)), arrayMap(i -> toString(number + i), range(16))) AS tags FROM numbers_mt(5000000)
OPTIMIZE TABLE map_subcol_pw_compact FINAL SETTINGS mutations_sync=1
test.query: SELECT tags['k0'], tags['k1'], tags['k2'], tags['k3'], tags['k4'], tags['k5'], tags['k6'], tags['k7'], tags['k8'], tags['k9'], tags['k10'], tags['k11'], tags['k12'], tags['k13'], tags['k14'], tags['k15'] FROM map_subcol_pw_wide FORMAT Null SETTINGS optimize_functions_to_subcolumns=1

SELECT tags['k0'], tags['k1'], tags['k2'], tags['k3'], tags['k4'], tags['k5'], tags['k6'], tags['k7'], tags['k8'], tags['k9'], tags['k10'], tags['k11'], tags['k12'], tags['k13'], tags['k14'], tags['k15'] FROM map_subcol_pw_compact FORMAT Null SETTINGS optimize_functions_to_subcolumns=1

SELECT count() FROM map_subcol_pw_wide WHERE tags['k0'] != '' AND tags['k1'] != '' AND tags['k2'] != '' AND tags['k3'] != '' AND tags['k4'] != '' AND tags['k5'] != '' AND tags['k6'] != '' AND tags['k7'] != '' AND tags['k8'] != '' AND tags['k9'] != '' AND tags['k10'] != '' AND tags['k11'] != '' AND tags['k12'] != '' AND tags['k13'] != '' AND tags['k14'] != '' AND tags['k15'] != '' SETTINGS optimize_functions_to_subcolumns=1, optimize_move_to_prewhere=0

SELECT count() FROM map_subcol_pw_compact WHERE tags['k0'] != '' AND tags['k1'] != '' AND tags['k2'] != '' AND tags['k3'] != '' AND tags['k4'] != '' AND tags['k5'] != '' AND tags['k6'] != '' AND tags['k7'] != '' AND tags['k8'] != '' AND tags['k9'] != '' AND tags['k10'] != '' AND tags['k11'] != '' AND tags['k12'] != '' AND tags['k13'] != '' AND tags['k14'] != '' AND tags['k15'] != '' SETTINGS optimize_functions_to_subcolumns=1, optimize_move_to_prewhere=0

SELECT count() FROM map_subcol_pw_wide PREWHERE tags['k0'] != '' AND tags['k1'] != '' AND tags['k2'] != '' AND tags['k3'] != '' AND tags['k4'] != '' AND tags['k5'] != '' AND tags['k6'] != '' AND tags['k7'] != '' AND tags['k8'] != '' AND tags['k9'] != '' AND tags['k10'] != '' AND tags['k11'] != '' AND tags['k12'] != '' AND tags['k13'] != '' AND tags['k14'] != '' AND tags['k15'] != '' SETTINGS optimize_functions_to_subcolumns=1

SELECT count() FROM map_subcol_pw_compact PREWHERE tags['k0'] != '' AND tags['k1'] != '' AND tags['k2'] != '' AND tags['k3'] != '' AND tags['k4'] != '' AND tags['k5'] != '' AND tags['k6'] != '' AND tags['k7'] != '' AND tags['k8'] != '' AND tags['k9'] != '' AND tags['k10'] != '' AND tags['k11'] != '' AND tags['k12'] != '' AND tags['k13'] != '' AND tags['k14'] != '' AND tags['k15'] != '' SETTINGS optimize_functions_to_subcolumns=1
test.create_query: CREATE TABLE map_subcol_pw_mixed (id UInt64, tags Map(String, String), value UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY id SETTINGS min_bytes_for_wide_part = 0, min_rows_for_wide_part = 0
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO map_subcol_pw_mixed SELECT number AS id, mapFromArrays( arrayMap(i -> 'k' || toString(i), range(16)), arrayMap(i -> toString(number + i), range(16))) AS tags, number AS value FROM numbers_mt(5000000)
OPTIMIZE TABLE map_subcol_pw_mixed FINAL SETTINGS mutations_sync=1
test.query: SELECT count() FROM map_subcol_pw_mixed WHERE tags['k0'] != '' AND tags['k1'] != '' AND tags['k2'] != '' AND tags['k3'] != '' AND value > 0 AND tags['k4'] != '' AND tags['k5'] != '' AND tags['k6'] != '' AND tags['k7'] != '' AND tags['k8'] != '' AND tags['k9'] != '' AND tags['k10'] != '' AND tags['k11'] != '' AND tags['k12'] != '' AND tags['k13'] != '' AND tags['k14'] != '' AND tags['k15'] != '' SETTINGS optimize_functions_to_subcolumns=1, move_all_conditions_to_prewhere=1
